products.name: Aerospace Composites Manufacturing
products.descriptor: AS9100-certified aerospace composite part manufacturing including radomes and UAS structures

evidence.snippet:
Aerospace Composites Manufacturing
==================================
![](https://abilitycomposites.com/wp-content/uploads/2015/05/aerospace-image.png)
Ability Composites’ personnel have years of experience with high quality **aerospace composites manufacturing**. Areas of expertise include composite radome systems, antenna enclosures (fairings), and small unmanned aircraft.  Our team works to the rigorous process controls and stringent quality of aerospace parts.

products.name: Aerospace Radomes
products.descriptor: Fiberglass and composite radomes for aerospace and ground-based systems

evidence.snippet:
Radomes
=======
### **Ability Composites specializes in radomes for aerospace and ground based systems.**
Fiberglass reinforced plastic is the primary material used to provide RF transparency.  For high frequency applications, more specialized materials are required.
Many of our customers are pushing the limits in communication/data transfer technology.  We work closely with our customers to ensure the parts meet their requirements.

products.name: Composite Pressure Vessels (COPV)
products.descriptor: Filament-wound composite overwrapped pressure vessels for aerospace and industrial use

evidence.snippet:
Pressure Vessels
================
Ability Composites manufactures composite pressure vessels (COPV manufacturing) for various industries using our 4 axis filament winding machine.  The developed in-house manufacturing process includes filament winding, pressure testing, and autofrettaging.

products.name: Filament Winding Services
products.descriptor: CNC filament winding service for pressure vessels, tubes, and drive shafts

evidence.snippet: Ability Composites has two CNC filament winding machines and the expertise to take on most projects. One machine is a 4-axis prepreg winder, the other is a 2-axis wet winder. Some recent projects include; pressure vessels for the aerospace market, large diameter carbon fiber tubes used in the nuclear industry, and thin walled square carbon fiber tubes for robotic systems.
